task_completion.description: Agent opens the Employees application in Odoo.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo Employees app dashboard or list view is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Agent searches for or filters employees currently in the 'R&D USA' department.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The search bar contains a filter for 'Department: R&D USA' or the agent is viewing the profiles of employees originally in this department.

task_completion.description: Agent changes Robert Miller's department to 'Research & Development'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Robert Miller's employee profile (Work Information tab) shows 'Research & Development' in the Department field, or the employee list view reflects this updated department.

task_completion.description: Agent changes Anita Oliver's department to 'Research & Development' (as she is also in R&D USA).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Anita Oliver's employee profile shows 'Research & Development' in the Department field, or the employee list view reflects this updated department.

task_completion.description: Agent navigates to the Departments view to manage the 'R&D USA' department.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Departments list or kanban view is visible on the screen.
The 'R&D USA' department form shows an 'Archived' ribbon, the 'Active' smart button is toggled off (red), or the department is archived via the Action menu dropdown.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Odoo graphical user interface to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show mouse clicks, dropdown selections, and form saves within the Odoo web interface, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely modified the employee records.
integrity.visual_evidence: The department changes are made through the standard Odoo edit/save flow (e.g., selecting from the Department dropdown), not by inspecting and editing the DOM/HTML.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely archived the department using Odoo's built-in functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: The archival is performed using the 'Action -> Archive' menu or by clicking the 'Active' smart button on the department form, resulting in the official Odoo 'Archived' status.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The 'R&D USA' department contains at least two employees that must be transferred: 'Robert Miller' (a synthetic employee created for this task) and 'Anita Oliver' (present in the official Odoo 17 demo data). Both must have their department changed to 'Research & Development'. After the transfers, the 'R&D USA' department must be archived. Look for the 'Archived' ribbon on the department form or check if the 'Active' toggle is set to false.
